sentences.arabic: اشْتُهِرَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ عُمَرُ بْنُ الْخَطَّابِ رَضِيَ اللهُ عَنْهُ بِعَدْلِهِ الشَّدِيدِ وَتَوَاضُعِهِ الْكَبِيرِ بَيْنَ أَفْرَادِ الرَّعِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Vođa pravovjernih Omer ibn el-Hattab, radijallahu anhu, bio je poznat po svojoj strogoj pravednosti i velikoj poniznosti među podanicima.
sentences.translationEn: The Leader of the Faithful, Umar ibn al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him), was famous for his rigorous justice and great humility among his subjects.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ عُمَرُ يَتَفَقَّدُ أَحْوَالَ النَّاسِ فِي ظَلَامِ اللَّيْلِ لِيَتَأَكَّدَ مِنْ أَنَّهُ لَا يُوجَدُ جَائِعٌ أَوْ مَظْلُومٌ فِي رِحَابِ دَوْلَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Omer je obilazio ljude u tami noći kako bi se uvjerio da u njegovoj državi nema gladnih ili obespravljenih.
sentences.translationEn: Umar used to check on the conditions of the people in the darkness of the night to ensure that no one was hungry or oppressed within his state.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ ذَكَرَ الْعُلَمَاءُ فِي سِيَرِهِ أَنَّهُ كَانَ يَحْمِلُ أَكْيَاسَ الدَّقِيقِ عَلَى ظَهْرِهِ لِيُوصِلَهَا إِلَى الْأَرَامِلِ وَالْأَيْتَامِ بِنَفْسِهِ.
sentences.translation: Učenjaci u njegovim biografijama navode da je sam nosio vreće brašna na svojim leđima kako bi ih dostavio udovicama i siročadi.
sentences.translationEn: Scholars mentioned in his biographies that he used to carry sacks of flour on his back to deliver them to widows and orphans himself.

sentences.arabic: يَعْكِسُ هَذَا السُلُوكُ الرَّفِيعُ مَفْهُومَ الْمَسْؤُولِيَّةِ الْحَقِيقِيَّةِ فِي الْإِسْلَامِ، حَيْثُ يُعْتَبَرُ الْحَاكِمُ خَادِمًا لِلشَّعْبِ وَمُحَاسَبًا أَمَامَ اللهِ.
sentences.translation: Ovo plemenito ponašanje odražava koncept istinske odgovornosti u islamu, gdje se vladar smatra slugom naroda i odgovornim pred Allahom.
sentences.translationEn: This noble behavior reflects the concept of true responsibility in Islam, where the ruler is considered a servant of the people and accountable before Allah.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ قِصَصَ الصَّحَابَةِ الْكِرَامِ تُعَلِّمُنَا أَنَّ الْإِيمَانَ لَيْسَ بِالتَّمَنِّي، وَلَكِنَّهُ مَا وَقَرَ فِي الْقَلْبِ وَصَدَّقَهُ الْعَمَلُ الصَّالِحُ.
sentences.translation: Priče o plemenitim ashabima uče nas da iman nije u pustim željama, već u onome što se ustali u srcu i što djela potvrde.
sentences.translationEn: The stories of the noble Companions teach us that faith is not achieved by wishful thinking, but by what is settled in the heart and confirmed by righteous deeds.

sentences.arabic: فَالْعَدْلُ هُوَ أَسَاسُ الْمُلْكِ وَالسَّبِيلُ الْوَحِيدُ لِلنَّجَاةِ وَالْفَلَاحِ فِي الْآخِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pravednost je temelj vlasti i jedini put ka spasu i uspjehu na onom svijetu.
sentences.translationEn: Justice is the foundation of governance and the only path to salvation and success in the Hereafter.
